code: import React,{useContext,useState}from"react";import{Link,useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{authAPI}from"../services/api";import{AuthContext}from"../context/AuthContext";import{getErrorMessage}from"../utils/helpers";import styles from"./AuthPages.module.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LoginPage=_ref=>{let{showToast}=_ref;const[form,setForm]=useState({email:"",password:""});const{login}=useContext(AuthContext);const navigate=useNavigate();const onSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const data=await authAPI.login(form);login(data.user);showToast("Login successful","success");if(data.user.role==="admin")navigate("/admin");else if(data.user.role==="doctor")navigate("/doctor");else navigate("/patient");}catch(error){showToast(getErrorMessage(error),"error");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles["auth-page"],children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:styles["auth-card"],children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:styles["auth-title"],children:"Hospital Management System"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:styles["auth-subtitle"],children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:styles["auth-form"],onSubmit:onSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles["form-group"],children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Email",value:form.email,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,email:e.target.value})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles["form-group"],children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",value:form.password,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,password:e.target.value})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:styles["btn-submit"],children:"Login"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:styles["auth-link"],children:["New user? ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/register",children:"Register here"})]})]})});};export default LoginPage;
